description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines four build jobs (build:cmake-nvhpc, build:cmake-nvhpc-nocuda, build:cp, build:pw) using the default stage. In the build:cmake-nvhpc job use the image nvcr.io/nvidia/nvhpc:21.2-devel-cuda11.2-ubuntu20.04, set DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive, then run apt-get -qq update; apt-get -qq install apt-transport-https ca-certificates gnupg software-properties-common wget; download and dearmor the Kitware GPG key and add it to /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/; add the Kitware repository; apt-get install -qq git cmake libfftw3-dev; cmake --version; mkdir build; cd build; and execute cmake -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF -DCMAKE_Fortran_COMPILER=mpif90 -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=mpicc -DQE_ENABLE_CUDA=ON -DQE_ENABLE_OPENACC=ON -DNVFORTRAN_CUDA_CC=70 .. && make -j4. In the build:cmake-nvhpc-nocuda job use the same image and variable, repeat the same setup steps, then run cmake -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON -DCMAKE_Fortran_COMPILER=mpif90 -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=mpicc -DQE_ENABLE_CUDA=OFF -DQE_ENABLE_OPENACC=OFF .. && make -j2. In the build:cp job use the ubuntu:20.04 image, run apt-get -qq update; DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive TZ=Etc/UTC apt-get -y install tzdata; apt-get -qq install m4 make wget curl git gfortran gcc libopenblas-dev libfftw3-dev libopenmpi-dev; then ./configure and make -j2 cp. In the build:pw job use the same ubuntu:20.04 image and initial installation steps, then ./configure and make -j2 pw. All jobs are tagged with gitlab-org-docker, and the pipeline includes an external .gitlab-ci.yml file.
